titleStmt.title: SII 27.124: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 124. (A.R. No. 590 of 1929-30.) ĀRŪR, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Vishṇumūrti temple.

This is badly damaged record dated Śaka 1 • • •, Kshaya, Kārttika śu. 1, Tuesday. The cycle year Kshaya corresponds to Śaka 1368, when the tithi occured on 1446 A.D., October 21, Friday. But in the next year, Prabhava, the given details correspond regularly to 1447 A.D., October 10. The latter might be the intended date of the record.

It seems to register a gift of money income for feeding brahmins in the maṭha, by Kuppaṇṇa-voḍeya who was administering Bārakūru-rājya at the instance of mahāpradhāna Mādaṇṇa-nāyaka (?). The gift was made in the presence of the god Mārkaṇḍēśvara of Kōṭeya-kere. It refers to the residents of Beḷaṁpaḷi who probably agreed to pay the amount regularly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ Avighnamastu namastuṁga śiraścuṁ
bi caṁdracāmaracāravē trayalōkyana
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1 varttamā
na kṣaya saṁvatsarada kārttikaśuddha 1 maṁgaḷavāradalu śrī manmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru vijayanagari
ya siṁhāsanadalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ pratipālisuva kāladalli
Avara Ājñārādhakarumappa śrī manmahāpradhāna mādaṁṇa voḍeyara ni
rūpadiṁ kuppaṁṇa Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanā kāladalu rāyara nirū
padiṁ kuppaṁṇa Oḍeyarū kōṭeya keryya mārkaṁḍēśvaradēvara saṁnidhiyallū
māḍidayaraḍa maṭhada dharmakke brāhmara bhōjanada jana
kāladalu dhāreya neṟadukoṁḍu beḷaṁpaḷiya grāma Oṁdakke kuḷavaṁnu bā
hoṁnanū sōmavāra Amāvāse puṁṇyakāladalu Ārā
yara nirūpadiṁ sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārā pūrvakavāgi yeṟadu koṭa
ru [�yo] ṁttire halaru yiḷuhi bahadu
Ūra Upacāra mādaṁṇanāyakage koṭa Aṁttu hma
naṭṭu kāla
kālada haḍikeyali rāhāra jananigaḷa haḍikeya suttigeya
hoṁnanu ḍisikoṭṭu baharu �yo
Eṁdu halaru Ūravara kaiyali beḍasalladu
nuṣyana koṭṭu �yo
hirā manuṣya kayya Arppisa saladu kaḍa
Ūrāḷali Agapaṭaduṁṭādare vobba
nālkuvaraṟa keyaluḷa nyāya dharmava vicārisi halaru tamma
koṁḍu samartthana samartthavāḷike tappade Ūra Upacāra tappade
naḍasikoṁḍu baharu yidakke tappivoṁdu vokkala mēle vobba
ya mēle tappiduṁṭādakke tappanū voppāmāḍikoṁḍu
Arasu Anusari ttidareĀvotta pariharisi koḍuvaru �yohaḍikeyū
nū dēśa saṁ yeṁdu hēḷade habbapaṁcami dāṁṭidaṁte kālakā
lake tettukoḍuveUyeṁdu mūḍilaru beḷaṁpaḷiya Ūru dēśavē katra
voppa barasi naṭṭa śilāśāsana �yoŪra Asādhya pāripattya vappa vo
Aramaneya kerahugāla baṁṭaru barasalladu sarvamānya
yidake Āru tappidaduṁṭādare śivaliṁgava kittu vāraṇāsiyali sāvirada
yiṁnūru kavileya paśuva koṁda dōśake hōharu beḷaṁpaḷiya Ūru dēva
mūḍilarū viṣṇumūrti śubhamastu maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
dānapālanāyōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānaṁ svargamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
